case_title: JOHN MOORE VS. IN GEAR FASHIONS, INC. et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOORE, JOHN JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 10.0 DAYS
PROOF OF SERVICE OF MOTION FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOORE, JOHN

LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF JOHN MOORE'S MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND CONSENT JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. WHILE THE CLAIMS REGARDING ACTUALLY INCURRED FEES (OVER $50,000) ARE EXORBITANT, THE SUMS FOR WHICH MOVANT SEEKS APPROVAL APPEAR REASONABLE. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: CURTIS E.A. KARNOW; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; NOT REPORTED.

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-20-2012 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-03-2012 Continued To Dec-05-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Prop 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Jul-24-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Josh Voorhees, Esq. of the Chanler Group, appearing for plaintiff and moving party.

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF JOHN MOORE'S Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment is Granted. While the claims regarding actually incurred fees (over $50,000) are exorbitant, the sums for which movant seeks approval appear reasonable. Order and Judgment signed in open Court. Judge: Curtis E.A. Karnow; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
